description: Maps super-dev agent types to required prerequisite artifacts and stage status checks. Uses glob patterns (*-doctype.md) for dynamic incremental naming. previousStages lists stage IDs that must be 'complete' or 'skipped' in workflow-tracking.json before this agent can spawn.

super-dev:bdd-scenario-writer.description: BDD Scenario Writing (Stage 3.5) requires completed requirements

super-dev:research-agent.description: Research (Stage 4) requires completed requirements and BDD scenarios

super-dev:product-designer.description: Product design (Stage 6.4) requires assessment with both arch and UI

super-dev:spec-writer.description: Spec writing (Stage 7) requires requirements, BDD scenarios, and code assessment

super-dev:spec-reviewer.description: Spec review (Stage 8) requires specification, implementation plan, task list, requirements, and BDD scenarios. No previousStages check — participates in spec iteration loop.

super-dev:dev-executor.description: Execution (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:rust-developer.description: Rust implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:golang-developer.description: Go implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:frontend-developer.description: Frontend implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:backend-developer.description: Backend implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:ios-developer.description: iOS implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:android-developer.description: Android implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:windows-app-developer.description: Windows implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:macos-app-developer.description: macOS implementation (Stage 9) requires complete specification, plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:qa-agent.description: QA verification (Stage 9.3) requires specification, BDD scenarios, implementation plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:tdd-guide.description: TDD (Stage 9.1) requires specification, requirements, BDD scenarios, implementation plan, task list, and approved spec review

super-dev:code-reviewer.description: Code review (Stage 10) requires specification, implementation summary, requirements, and BDD scenarios. No previousStages check — participates in implementation iteration loop.

super-dev:adversarial-reviewer.description: Adversarial review (Stage 10) requires specification, implementation summary, requirements, and BDD scenarios. No previousStages check — participates in implementation iteration loop.

super-dev:docs-executor.description: Documentation (Stage 11) requires specification, all implementation phases complete, and gate-implementation-complete.sh PASS

super-dev:handoff-writer.description: Handoff (Stage 11.5) requires specification directory with all artifacts
